appName.message: 탭 탐색기 — 새 탭 속 파일 탐색기
appName.description: Extension name shown in Chrome UI and the Web Store listing.

appShortName.description: Short name used in limited-space UI like the toolbar icon tooltip.

appDescription.message: 새 탭이 곧 파일 탐색기. 로컬 드라이브 탐색, 복사·이동·이름 변경·휴지통까지 Chrome 안에서. Native Host 설치 필요.

common_continue.description: Confirm button for system-path pending confirms.

common_retry.description: Button that re-runs the last failed operation.

common_dismiss.description: Button that hides an error banner without retrying.

common_read_only.description: Tag shown next to a read-only drive or file.

app_home_title.description: Heading on the drive-list home screen.

app_loading_drives.description: Home-screen placeholder while drives are being enumerated.

app_no_drives_hint.message: 드라이브를 찾을 수 없습니다. 개발 패널(⚙)을 열어 호스트 연결을 확인하세요.
app_no_drives_hint.description: Help text shown on the home screen when the Native Host returned zero drives.

app_drive_capacity.description: Drive capacity meta line, e.g. '12 GB 사용 가능 / 500 GB'.

app_drive_read_only_suffix.description: Appears after the capacity line when a drive is mounted read-only.

toolbar_new_folder.description: Title/aria-label for the toolbar create-folder button.

toolbar_new_folder_button.description: Visible label on the toolbar create-folder button.

toolbar_dev_panel.description: aria-label for the developer panel toggle.

toolbar_dev_panel_title.description: Tooltip for the developer panel toggle.

breadcrumb_aria.description: aria-label for the breadcrumb navigation region.

breadcrumb_drives.description: Leftmost breadcrumb that returns to the drive-list screen.

sidebar_drives.description: Sidebar section title listing mounted drives.

sidebar_no_drives.description: Placeholder shown when no drives are available.

sidebar_browse.description: Sidebar section title for user shortcuts (future).

sidebar_browse_empty.description: Placeholder shown when the Browse section has no shortcuts.

filelist_col_name.description: File list column header — file name.

filelist_col_modified.description: File list column header — modified timestamp.

filelist_loading.description: File list placeholder while entries are loading.

filelist_empty.description: File list placeholder when the current directory has no entries.

filelist_read_only.description: Tooltip for the lock icon shown on read-only entries.

statusbar_drives_count.description: Status bar summary on the home screen.

statusbar_items.description: Status bar summary while browsing a directory.

statusbar_selected.description: Suffix appended to the item count when one or more rows are selected.

statusbar_load_more.description: Button that fetches the next page of directory entries.

statusbar_large_dir.message: 대용량 폴더($total$개 항목) — 성능이 저하될 수 있습니다. 가상 스크롤은 Phase 1.5에 도입 예정입니다.
statusbar_large_dir.description: Warning shown when a directory exceeds the large-dir threshold.

error_retryable_tag.description: Small tag inside the error banner indicating the operation can be retried.

error_hint_host_not_found.message: 네이티브 호스트 'com.local.fx'를 찾지 못했습니다. 설치 프로그램을 실행하거나 NativeMessagingHosts 등록 상태를 확인하세요.
error_hint_host_not_found.description: Install hint shown when the extension cannot reach the Native Messaging host.

error_hint_may_need_install.message: 네이티브 호스트가 설치되어 있지 않거나 등록되지 않은 것 같습니다. 설치 프로그램을 실행하세요.
error_hint_may_need_install.description: Generic install hint shown when the host reports mayNeedInstall.

error_cannot_create_at_home.message: 홈 화면에서는 폴더를 만들 수 없습니다.
error_cannot_create_at_home.description: Surfaced when createFolder is invoked while currentPath is null.

error_cannot_rename_root.message: 루트 경로는 이름을 변경할 수 없습니다.
error_cannot_rename_root.description: Surfaced when renameEntry is invoked on a drive/volume root.

devpanel_aria.description: aria-label for the slide-over dev panel.

devpanel_ping_host.description: Button that sends a ping op to the Native Host.

devpanel_pinging.description: Button state while a ping request is in flight.

devpanel_retryable_suffix.description: Suffix appended to the dev panel error line when the op is retryable.

context_open_default.description: Context menu — open a file with the OS default handler.

context_reveal.description: Context menu — show the entry in the OS file manager.

context_copy.description: Context menu — copy selection to clipboard.

context_cut.description: Context menu — cut selection to clipboard.

context_paste.description: Context menu — paste clipboard contents into the current directory.

context_trash.description: Context menu — send the entry to the OS recycle bin / trash.

context_permanent_delete.description: Context menu — delete the entry permanently.

context_new_folder.description: Context menu — create a new folder in the current directory.

context_refresh.description: Context menu — re-read the current directory.

dialog_rename_title.description: Default RenameDialog heading when no custom title is provided.

dialog_rename_title_new_folder.description: RenameDialog heading when creating a folder.

dialog_rename_title_rename.description: RenameDialog heading when renaming an entry.

dialog_rename_default_name_new_folder.description: Default suggested name pre-filled when creating a new folder.

dialog_rename_validation_empty.description: Validation error: name field is empty.

dialog_rename_validation_whitespace.description: Validation error: name has outer whitespace.

dialog_rename_validation_forbidden.description: Validation error: name contains reserved characters.

dialog_rename_validation_control.message: 제어 문자(개행/탭 등)는 사용할 수 없습니다.
dialog_rename_validation_control.description: Validation error: name contains C0 control characters.

dialog_delete_message_permanent.message: '$name$'를 영구 삭제합니다. 이 작업은 되돌릴 수 없습니다.

system_path_confirm_title.description: ConfirmDialog title when the host guards against writing to a system path.

system_path_confirm_message.description: ConfirmDialog body for a single-path system guard (mkdir/remove).

system_path_confirm_message_rename.description: ConfirmDialog body for a rename system guard (src OR dst may match).

dialog_conflict_remaining.message: 남은 충돌 $count$건 — 선택을 일괄 적용하려면 아래 체크박스를 사용하세요.
dialog_conflict_remaining.description: ConflictDialog hint when a batch has multiple conflicts.

dialog_conflict_message.message: '$name$' 파일/폴더가 대상 위치에 이미 있습니다. 어떻게 처리할까요?

dialog_conflict_size_label.description: Label prefixing the file size in the ConflictDialog comparison panel.

dialog_conflict_modified_label.description: Label prefixing the modified timestamp in the ConflictDialog comparison panel.

dialog_conflict_apply_to_all.description: Checkbox label that carries the chosen strategy across the rest of the batch.

dialog_conflict_skip.description: ConflictDialog action — leave the destination untouched.

dialog_conflict_overwrite.description: ConflictDialog action — replace the destination with the source.

dialog_conflict_rename.description: ConflictDialog action — keep both by renaming the incoming copy.

dialog_failure_col_path.description: FailureSummary table column — full path of the failing entry.

dialog_failure_col_message.description: FailureSummary table column — human-readable error message.

toast_kind_copy.description: Progress toast badge for copy jobs.

toast_kind_move.description: Progress toast badge for move jobs.

toast_canceling.description: Progress toast state — a cancel has been dispatched but the op hasn't terminated yet.

toast_done.description: Progress toast terminal state — op completed successfully.

toast_canceled.description: Progress toast terminal state — op was canceled.

toast_failed.description: Progress toast terminal state — op failed with no per-entry breakdown.

toast_failed_count.description: Progress toast terminal state — some entries succeeded, some failed.

toast_file_progress.description: Per-file progress counter inside the toast.

toast_cancel_button.description: Button on a running toast that issues a cancel.

toast_failures_summary.description: Collapsed <summary> of the per-entry failure list on a terminated toast.

toast_failures_more.description: Suffix shown when the failure list has been truncated.

toast_result_copy_title.description: FailureSummary title when the terminated job was a copy.

toast_result_move_title.description: FailureSummary title when the terminated job was a move.

onboarding_title.description: Heading on the full-panel onboarding view shown when the native messaging host is missing.

onboarding_subtitle.message: 탭 탐색기가 로컬 드라이브를 읽으려면 작은 도우미 앱이 필요합니다. 한 번만 설치하면 됩니다.
onboarding_subtitle.description: Single-sentence explanation under the onboarding title.

onboarding_step_caption_1.description: Secondary line under step 1 (English caption beneath localized text).

onboarding_step_4.description: Onboarding step 4 — finish by retrying the host connection.

onboarding_download_btn.description: Primary button label in the onboarding view (Windows path).

onboarding_download_btn_unavailable.description: Disabled-button label shown when the user is not on Windows.

onboarding_retry_btn.description: Secondary button label in the onboarding view that re-attempts host connection.

onboarding_retry_in_progress.description: Retry button label while a retry sequence is in flight. The /4 denominator counts ALL attempts including the immediate first try (attempt 1 = no wait, attempts 2-4 = backoff-gated). Keep MAX_RETRY_ATTEMPTS in HostMissingOnboarding.tsx in lock-step with this denominator.

onboarding_retry_exhausted.message: 여전히 호스트가 발견되지 않습니다. 인스톨러가 정상 종료되었는지 확인하세요.
onboarding_retry_exhausted.description: Inline message shown when all 4 retry attempts have failed.

onboarding_macos_pending.message: macOS 인스톨러는 v0.4.x에 제공 예정입니다. 지금은 소스에서 빌드해 주세요.
onboarding_macos_pending.description: Notice shown to macOS users that no signed installer is available yet.

onboarding_log_hint.description: Small hint shown at the bottom of the onboarding view pointing at the install log path.

onboarding_dismiss.description: Optional onboarding dismiss button — falls back to the plain error banner.

toolbar_settings.description: aria-label for the toolbar settings (gear) button.

toolbar_settings_title.description: Tooltip for the toolbar settings (gear) button.

update_settings_title.description: Title of the update-check settings modal.

update_settings_description.message: 활성화하면 네이티브 호스트가 24시간에 한 번 GitHub Releases를 조회해 새 버전이 있는지 확인합니다.
update_settings_description.description: Body text under the update-check settings title.

update_settings_toggle_label.description: Label next to the update-check toggle checkbox.

update_settings_env_var_hint.message: 참고: 호스트 환경에서 LOCALFX_DISABLE_UPDATE_CHECK=1 을 설정하면 이 토글과 무관하게 업데이트 확인이 강제 비활성화됩니다.
update_settings_env_var_hint.description: Help text explaining the host-side override env var.

update_consent_title.description: Title of the consent dialog shown the first time the user enables update checks.

update_consent_body.message: 업데이트 자동 확인을 켜면 확장의 개인정보 보호 수준이 변경됩니다. 아래 내용을 확인해주세요:
update_consent_body.description: Lead paragraph of the consent dialog.

update_consent_bullet_what.description: Consent bullet — what the feature does.

update_consent_bullet_sent.message: GitHub에는 User-Agent 문자열과 IP 주소만 노출됩니다.

update_consent_bullet_not_sent.message: 파일 경로, 파일 내용, 사용 통계는 전송되지 않습니다.
update_consent_bullet_not_sent.description: Consent bullet — what is NOT sent.

update_consent_bullet_optout.message: 같은 설정 패널에서 언제든지 끌 수 있습니다.

update_consent_agree.description: Confirm button on the consent dialog.

update_toast_title.description: Persistent toast title when a newer release was found.

update_toast_current_version.description: Sub-line in the update toast showing the installed version.

update_toast_download_button.description: Action button on the update toast that opens the release URL.

update_toast_host_disabled.message: 호스트 환경에서 업데이트 확인이 비활성화되어 있습니다.
update_toast_host_disabled.description: Info message shown when the host returned E_DISABLED.
